name: ui-skills
description: Reverse-engineer any live website into production-ready React + Tailwind code. Reads actual computed CSS, DOM structure, JS interactions, and animations — not just a screenshot. Auto-detects responsive breakpoints via viewport sweep. Verifies output with 60 fps three-capture comparison (static, scroll, interaction). Includes a sub-skill for precise animation extraction with 11-point measurement, WAAPI scrubbing, and canvas/WebGL frame-by-frame comparison.
